meaning: n.季刊adj.一年四次的,每季的adv.每季地
examples: Their quarterly meetings were anodyne affairs.
A full listing of the companies will be published quarterly.
Clients normally pay fees in advance, monthly, quarterly, or yearly.
Coca-Cola , Intel and JPMorgan Chase all announced quarterly earnings that topped Street predictions.
Moreover the stocks listed below have not missed a quarterly payment in the past decade.
